title: network-libp2p: `NetworkError::RPCError(String)` conflates an explicit peer rejection with a transient remote-side failure, so the worker `QuorumWaiter` permanently gives up on a peer that hit a one-off internal error
network-libp2p: operator-set peer-scoring ban/disconnect thresholds are silently ignored (`Peer` is pinned to `PeerConfig::default()`), and two documented `ScoreConfig` fields are dead
network-libp2p: every dial failure is reported to the caller as the hardcoded string "dial attempt timedout", erasing the real `DialError` (wrong key, refused, firewall) during validator onboarding
network-libp2p: `GetClosestPeers` query timeouts discard every peer the query already discovered, starving the discovery loop exactly when the node is short on peers

network-libp2p: valid consensus gossip is dropped silently (and valid RPC responses become spurious `PeerMissing` errors) when the sender's BLS identity is not yet resolved, even though the request path handles that exact race
refactor(network): consolidate the bulk request-response paths onto hardened bidirectional streams, keep single-shot RPCs on request-response
Nodes expose no operational metrics; `--metrics` is an accepted no-op flag
network-libp2p: req-res codec commits attacker-declared buffer sizes before the body arrives
Network-key rotation breaks the bls_by_peer_id iff-invariant (stale entries, counter loss, zombie records)
Native (blst) BLS signature-verification precompile for on-chain consensus verification
Dial Unkown BLS Keys - Validator Fallback
refactor(network): make AllPeers the single source of truth for peer information
Consensus gossip can multiple count the same validator.
Worker Gateway: stateless public-facing RPC proxy for worker endpoints
Validate and map PeerIds from kademlia records
Accept late gossip from the previous committee within a configurable grace window
Public release pipeline with verifiable provenance
Peer penalty system bans honest peers during observer joins on WAN
Wire `WorkerConfigs` into epoch-boundary base fee adjustment (worker 0 only)
Update `f+1` threshold
Refactor general consensus side storage.
Add Execution Extensions (ExEx) plugin system
Implement per-epoch base fee adjustment via WorkerConfigs contract
Dynamic base fee adjustment via EpochGasTarget contract
